The '''subjugation of the Yatir''' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Absit]] was a battle that took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], on the [[Yatir]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was overrun by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army's]] [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]], also known as the ''Hell's Hammers''; the conflict resulted in the subjugation of the Yatir.
